ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Total health expenditure of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease category */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the disease data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diseases_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES disease_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The specific year for health statistics */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the year data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where executions occurred */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the execution */,
  "number_of_executions" INTEGER /* Number of executions reported */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the execution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hiv_aids_statistics" (
  "hiv_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HIV/AIDS statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "hiv_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of HIV/AIDS cases */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the HIV/AIDS statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hiv_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hiv_aids_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hiv_aids_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "malaria_statistics" (
  "malaria_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each malaria statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "malaria_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of malaria cases */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the malaria statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("malaria_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_malaria_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_malaria_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drowning_statistics" (
  "drowning_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drowning statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "drowning_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of drowning cases */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the drowning statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drowning_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drowning_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drowning_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maternal_disorders" (
  "maternal_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maternal disorder statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "maternal_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of maternal disorder cases */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the maternal disorder statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maternal_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternal_disorders_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternal_disorders_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_use_statistics" (
  "drug_use_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug use statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "drug_use_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of drug use disorder cases */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the drug use statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_use_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_use_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_use_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardiovascular_statistics" (
  "cardiovascular_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cardiovascular disease statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "cardiovascular_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cardiovascular disease cases */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the cardiovascular disease statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cardiovascular_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cardiovascular_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cardiovascular_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suicide_statistics" (
  "suicide_statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suicide statistic */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistic */,
  "suicide_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of suicide cases */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the suicide statistic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suicide_statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_statistics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data source data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the disease category data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
